provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human woman in her 40s missing her left leg below the knee with a functional mechanical prosthetic leg that is clearly ship-issue not cosmetic — bare metal and hydraulics visible, wearing Compact uniform trousers with the left leg hemmed and adapted to meet the prosthetic socket, a standard steel-blue uniform jacket, regulation boots on the right foot and a magnetic attachment plate on the prosthetic, she stands evenly and works normally
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: On-style gritty space costume. Faction-appropriate material vocabulary and wear level. Reads as a working person in a spacefaring civilization.
